title: Fluent Bit Configuration
description: Configuration variables for deploying and configuring Fluent Bit, a super fast, lightweight, and highly scalable logging and metrics processor and forwarder.

FLUENTBIT_VERSION.description: Specific version of Fluent Bit to install. Can be a numeric version (e.g. '3.0.0') or an alias like 'latest'.

LIBSCRIPT_GLOBAL_INSTALL_METHOD.description: Global override for how software should be installed across all systems (e.g. system package manager vs downloaded binaries).

LIBSCRIPT_WINDOWS_PKG_MGR.description: Global package manager override for Windows targets (e.g. winget, choco).

FLUENTBIT_INSTALL_METHOD.description: How to install Fluent Bit. 'system' uses the native OS package manager, 'source' downloads the official binaries.

FLUENTBIT_CONFIG_FILE.description: Absolute path to a pre-existing custom fluent-bit.conf file to use instead of the default configuration.

FLUENTBIT_LOG_LEVEL.description: The logging verbosity level for the Fluent Bit daemon itself (e.g. info, debug, error).

FLUENTBIT_HTTP_SERVER.description: Enable the built-in HTTP server for metrics and health checks. Highly recommended for monitoring.

FLUENTBIT_LISTEN_PORT.description: Port for the Fluent Bit HTTP metrics interface to listen on.

FLUENTBIT_LISTEN_ADDRESS.description: Address for the Fluent Bit HTTP metrics interface to bind to.

FLUENTBIT_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Optional: Unix socket for the Fluent Bit metrics interface to listen on (Linux/macOS only).

FLUENTBIT_DEFAULT_INPUT.description: Default input plugin to configure for collecting data (e.g. 'tail', 'forward', 'cpu', 'dummy').

FLUENTBIT_DEFAULT_OUTPUT.description: Default output plugin to configure for routing data (e.g. 'stdout', 'es', 'loki', 'http').

FLUENTBIT_SERVICE_RUN_AS_USER.description: Windows local user account to run the service under (leave empty to use Network Service / Local System).

FLUENTBIT_SERVICE_RUN_AS_PASSWORD.description: Password for the Windows local user account (if applicable).

FLUENTBIT_SERVICE_NAME.description: Custom name for the Fluent Bit background service (allows side-by-side installations).
